headline: Expeditors International Of Washington (EXPD) Stock After 41% Year Rise And DCF Fair Value Estimate
summary: If you are wondering whether Expeditors International of Washington is still worth your attention at current prices, this article focuses squarely on what the latest data says about its valuation. The stock last closed at US$160.73, with returns of 5.8% year to date and 41.2% over the past year. Over the past week it saw a small decline of 0.4%, while the past month showed a gain of 1.7%. Recent news coverage has highlighted Expeditors International of Washington in the context of broader...
